ddls:
CREATE TABLE "children" (
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each child */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the child */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age group of the child */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the child */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the child in kg */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the child in cm */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* List of allergies (if any) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the child */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent or guardian */,
  "dietary_preferences" TEXT /* Dietary preferences of the child */,
  "last_meal_plan_date" TEXT /* Date of the last meal plan generated for the child */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("child_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost plan */,
  "plan_type" TEXT /* Type of cost plan (Thrifty, Low-Cost, etc.) */,
  "monthly_budget" REAL /* Monthly budget for this plan */,
  "weekly_budget" REAL /* Weekly budget for this plan */,
  "daily_budget" REAL /* Daily budget for this plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cost plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutrition_guidelines" (
  "guideline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutritional guideline */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the guideline */,
  "calories" REAL /* Recommended daily calorie intake */,
  "protein" REAL /* Recommended daily protein intake in grams */,
  "fats" REAL /* Recommended daily fat intake in grams */,
  "carbohydrates" REAL /* Recommended daily carbohydrate intake in grams */,
  "vitamins" TEXT /* Recommended daily vitamin intake */,
  "minerals" TEXT /* Recommended daily mineral intake */,
  "fiber" REAL /* Recommended daily fiber intake in grams */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guideline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meal_plans" (
  "meal_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meal plan */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the child for whom the plan is created */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cost plan used */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week for the meal plan */,
  "meals" TEXT /* List of meals for the day */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the meal plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the meal plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the meal plan (active, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meal_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meal_plans_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_id") REFERENCES children ("child_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meal_plans_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES cost_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth metric entry */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the child being measured */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the child in kg */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the child in cm */,
  "body_mass_index" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) of the child */,
  "measurement_location" TEXT /* Location where the measurement was taken (e.g., clinic, home) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_metrics_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_id") REFERENCES children ("child_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipes" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the recipe */,
  "ingredients" TEXT /* List of ingredients required */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for preparing the dish */,
  "prep_time" INTEGER /* Preparation time in minutes */,
  "cook_time" INTEGER /* Cooking time in minutes */,
  "calories" REAL /* Total calorie count of the recipe */,
  "protein" REAL /* Total protein content of the recipe in grams */,
  "fats" REAL /* Total fat content of the recipe in grams */,
  "carbohydrates" REAL /* Total carbohydrate content of the recipe in grams */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the meal category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES meal_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., parent, healthcare provider) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure login */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user in the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "allergies" (
  "allergy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allergy entry */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the child with the allergy */,
  "allergen" TEXT /* Name of the allergen */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the allergy */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms of the allergy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allergy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allergies_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_id") REFERENCES children ("child_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meal_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "meal_plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the meal plan being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the meal plan */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the parent */,
  "meal_date" TEXT /* Date the meal was prepared */,
  "serving_size" TEXT /* Serving size of the meal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meal_feedback_meal_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("meal_plan_id") REFERENCES meal_plans ("meal_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meal_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasonal_ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the seasonal ingredient */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the ingredient is available */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Availability status (true or false) */,
  "nutritional_value" TEXT /* Nutritional value of the ingredient */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the ingredient (e.g., local, imported) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meal_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meal category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the meal category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the meal category */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon or image associated with the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Read status of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., meal plan update, growth metric alert) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the notification (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
